Meta.title: Holive — Purity, loyalty, and code
Meta.description: Full-stack marketing, digitalization, and courses. We transform businesses with sacred precision and living systems.

Hero.headline: Living code. Sacred brand.
Hero.sub: Marketing, systems, and courses for businesses that choose purity, loyalty, and real transformation.

services.title: Solutions that move brand and market
services.intro: Strategy, content, design, and print — one voice across physical and digital.
services.holiTip: Pick one channel to tend well before you open ten more.

digital.title: Systems that work while you grow
digital.intro: Webs, SaaS, automations, and advisory — living code for living businesses.
digital.holiTip: Digitize the repeatable. Keep humans on the decisions that matter.

courses.title: Learn the method. Scale with Holive.
courses.intro: Practical tracks built to apply — waitlist open while we plant the next season.
courses.holiTip: Learn to deliver. Then let the system carry the weight.

blog.title: Notes from the ecosystem
blog.intro: Entrepreneurial field notes — useful, bilingual in spirit, Holive voice.
blog.holiAside: I read this twice. The second time I planted one action.

about.title: Purity. Loyalty. Living systems.
about.body: Holive helps traditional businesses and growth-minded teams move into digital life without losing soul — marketing, systems, and learning that feel pure, loyal, and alive.
about.holiBody: Holi is our crayon companion: the archetype of leaving comfort to build something useful. She believes businesses are living ecosystems — plant processes, harvest time. Never fluff without action.

contact.title: Tell us your next move
contact.body: One message is enough. We reply with clarity — no noise.
contact.holiTip: Say the real friction. We build from honesty.

historias.title: Comic strips from the ecosystem
historias.intro: Animated comic experiences with Holi — tap each panel, plant the refrán, harvest the idea.

companion.c: Almost there — plant one clear next step.
companion.d: You made it. Sync the neural pulse below?

Manifesto.title: Purity. Loyalty. Transformation.
Manifesto.body: Holive joins the sacred fidelity of brand with the precision of code. We help SMBs and ambitious teams move from traditional to digital — without losing soul, with systems that live.

purity.title: Purity
purity.text: Clear message, clean design, promises kept.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.text: Long-term relationships. Your growth is ours.

code.title: Code
code.text: Automations, sites, and data that hold the vision.

Services.title: Stories you see, touch, and measure
Services.intro: Not a card grid — a layered journey from strategy to print, from feed to storefront.

strategy.title: Integrated strategy
strategy.text: Physical + digital aligned. One voice, many channels.

design.title: Graphic design
design.text: Identity, assets, and visual systems with character.

print.title: Editorial & print
print.text: Banners, flyers, magazines, books — tangible brand.

Digital.title: Systems that work while you grow
Digital.intro: Webs, SaaS, tracking, integrations, and solution manufacturing — with high-touch advisory when it matters.

webs.title: Webs & products
webs.text: Experiences that convert, not just look good.

systems.title: Systems & SaaS
systems.text: Custom tools to operate with clarity.

automation.title: Automations
automation.text: Flows that remove friction and free time.

maquila.title: Solution manufacturing
maquila.text: We build and integrate what your business needs.

Footer.gameHint: Made it this far? Sync the neural pulse below.

HoliGame.title: Neural Pulse
HoliGame.subtitle: Watch the sequence. Replay the signal.
HoliGame.coach: Holi coaches — you sync the nodes.
HoliGame.teaser: Classic memory depths plus Freestyle healing drum. Enter training and choose your pulse.

train.title: Choose your neural path
train.subtitle: Classic builds memory through rising sequence depths. Freestyle opens a healing drum kit for rhythm, breath, and daily missions.
train.status: Choose Classic levels or Freestyle healing drum
train.classicBody: Memorize purple and gold node sequences, clear depths, unlock rewards, and keep your high score moving.
train.freestyleBody: Song charts, healer beds, sequencer, and solo immersive jam — hours of Holive rhythm.

hub.coach: Classic depths — clear one to unlock the next.

freestyle.title: Freestyle Healing Drum
freestyle.subtitle: Pads, healer beds, songs, and jam — rhythm without fail.
freestyle.coach: Healing drum active — play your rhythm.

songMoods.forestPulseMood: Soft canopy breath and earth hits.
songMoods.deepHealRitualMood: Slow ritual drones and deep pads.
songMoods.auroraSpiralMood: Spiral lanes racing around the kit.
songMoods.sunrootGrooveMood: Sunny root groove for long jams.

HoliGame.tap: Memorize purple & gold pulses, then tap them back.
HoliGame.audioNote: Starting sync enables binaural beats, zen pad, and singing-bowl hits on each node (headphones recommended).
HoliGame.selectBlurb: Each depth adds tempo, nodes, and noise. Clear to unlock the next.
HoliGame.reduced: Motion reduced — playable; audio still optional via mute.
HoliGame.fullscreenDenied: Fullscreen unavailable — arena mode still fills the screen.
HoliGame.bowlHint: Each node sings a bowl hit — headphones recommended

unlockCode.title: Sync code
unlockCode.blurb: A small unlock — proof you held the signal.

mantraCard.title: Mantra card
mantraCard.blurb: A Holive mantra stamped to your run.

certificate.title: Pulse certificate
certificate.blurb: Shareable certificado de pulso — you finished the mesh.

lead.blurb: Optional: leave your email and the goal you are syncing toward. Holi keeps it useful — no hard wall.
lead.thanks: Signal planted. Holi will tend it.
lead.error: Could not send — try again or skip.

core.title: Holive core
core.text: Brand and code share one pulse — purity in, systems out.

brand.title: Brand signal
brand.text: Identity that stays loyal while channels multiply.

code.title: Living code
code.text: Sites, SaaS, and automations that keep the vision online.

pulse.title: Market pulse
pulse.text: Content and campaigns timed to real attention, not noise.

grow.title: Growth loop
grow.text: Measure, iterate, deepen loyalty — then scale.

sync.title: Client sync
sync.text: Advisory that keeps tech decisions aligned with business.

HoliStories.title: Comic strips from the ecosystem
HoliStories.intro: Tap each strip: Holi advances panel by panel with business refranes. Plant. Harvest. Stay useful — she never floats over your work.

panels.0: Holi plants one small process — no theater.
panels.1: The clock still ticks. Chaos doesn’t.
panels.2: Harvest: hours freed to serve for real.

comfort.title: Leaving comfort
comfort.moral: Leaving comfort is not abandoning soul.

panels.1: Holi points to the digital warehouse door.
panels.2: Same craft. Better system. Same loyalty.

useful.title: Theater vs usefulness
useful.moral: If it doesn’t help you serve, it isn’t strategy.

panels.0: Lights, slides, applause… zero better-served clients.
panels.1: Holi asks: does this serve the people who pay you?

ecosystem.title: One weak node
ecosystem.moral: Business is an ecosystem — one weak node softens the mesh.

panels.0: Bright brand. Soft ops. The mesh creaks.
panels.1: Holi pulls the thread — everything moves together.

patience.title: Funnel season
patience.moral: Patience with systems; urgency with clarity.

panels.0: They want fruit yesterday. The funnel is still a seed.
panels.1: Holi waters calmly — and cuts the noise.

loyalty.title: The open table
loyalty.moral: Loyalty is planted in every delivery.

panels.0: A client returns with doubt — not theater complaints.
panels.1: Holi serves clarity. No empty script.

glyphEye.title: The eye that pays attention
glyphEye.refran: Ignore the client and you work blind.
glyphEye.hint: Move the pointer · the eye follows

kinetic.title: Words that pull you inward
kinetic.refran: Clarity advances when noise stays behind.

seed.title: From seed to olive
seed.refran: There is no harvest without the courage to plant.

0.label: Seed
0.text: One clear idea. One small process. Start here.

2.label: Sapling
2.text: The system holds — it no longer lives only in memory.

3.label: Olive
3.text: Harvest: time, loyalty, and a business that breathes.

diptych.title: Comfort zone · Living warehouse
diptych.refran: Leaving comfort isn’t betraying the craft — it’s expanding it.

comfort.label: Panel A
comfort.title: Comfort zone
comfort.text: Everything by hand, everything known. It works… until growth asks for rhythm.
comfort.aside: Comfort guards the past. Systems guard tomorrow.

warehouse.label: Panel B
warehouse.title: Living warehouse
warehouse.text: Flows, channels, and code carry the weight — the craft stays human.
warehouse.aside: The warehouse doesn’t replace the soul — it frees it to serve.

ecosystem.title: Living ecosystem
ecosystem.refran: Tug one node and you’ll see if the mesh is alive.
ecosystem.hint: Drag a node · release and it returns home

blurbs.core: The Holive core beats when brand and systems share one pulse.
blurbs.brand: Brand is a loyal signal while channels multiply.
blurbs.ops: Operations are roots — without them the canopy falls.
blurbs.code: Living code holds the vision when no one is watching.
blurbs.content: Content is the climate of the ecosystem — rhythm, not noise.
blurbs.clients: Clients are the sun: without attention, nothing grows.

mantra.title: Craft mantras
mantra.refran: Repeat what is useful until it becomes reflex.

items.2: One well-tended channel beats ten abandoned ones.
items.3: Loyalty is measured in deliveries, not slogans.
items.4: Digitize the repeatable; humanize the decisive.
items.5: Patience with systems; urgency with clarity.
items.6: The business returns what you plant.

mirror.title: What you plant returns
mirror.refran: The business returns — amplified — what you planted.
